creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fixed in [1]. Commit-hook didn't strike this one because I failed to put a space between the PR number and the footnote number. Nevertheless, devel/cmake-core now builds verbosely.

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=97c31b93991c7a4bef0b2e8a5f8ec6c42e3e7d86
